description: Positions a point on a surface or solid face using UV coordinates (0-100 range). When assigned to a variable, renders as a visible sphere. Used standalone or inside solidmeasure, solidangle, solidrightangle, solidsector, solidface.
utility: Position a 3D point on a surface or solid face via UV coordinates

arguments.name: shape
arguments.description: A surface (plot3d, paraplot3d) or solid shape variable reference

arguments.name: faceIndex
arguments.description: Face index on a solid (0-based). Required for solids, omitted for surfaces

arguments.name: color
arguments.description: Point color when rendered as a sphere

alternates.description: Point on a surface via UV coordinates
Point on a specific face of a solid via UV coordinates

alternates.syntax: P = loc3d(solid, faceIndex, u, v, c(color))
alternates.description: Renders a visible sphere at the UV position on the solid

examples.scenario: Visible point on a solid face
examples.expression:
C = cube3d(at(10,10), view(25,25), 3)
P = loc3d(C, 0, 50, 50, c(magenta))

C = cube3d(at(10,10), view(25,25), 3)
P = loc3d(C, 0, 0, 0, c(magenta))

C = cube3d(at(10,10), view(25,25), 3)
P1 = loc3d(C, 0, 0, 0, c(magenta))
P2 = loc3d(C, 0, 100, 0, c(magenta))
M = solidmeasure(C, P1, P2, "3 cm")

examples.scenario: Point on a surface at UV (30, 70)
